title: Internal Plant
definition: The metaphorical representation of the self as a living entity that undergoes changes over time.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The metaphorical representation of the self as a living entity that undergoes changes over time.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The metaphorical representation of the self as a living entity that undergoes changes over time.
difficulty_levels.expert: The understanding that by treating one's internal state with the same rigorous observation as external objects, profound insights about impermanence and interconnectedness can be gained.

extra_fields.insight: The understanding that by treating one's internal state with the same rigorous observation as external objects, profound insights about impermanence and interconnectedness can be gained.
